0DTE Max Pain level 0.92% below spot. Magnetic attraction zone minimizing option payouts. Primary MM target for expiry.

Highest 0DTE PUT OI (14277) and strong MONTHLY presence (20613). Deep crisis support. Extreme PCR validates bearish positioning.
High volume zone (33289 VOL) with significant CALL OI (8856). Near-spot friction causing choppy price action. dealer delta hedging creates noise.
